title: dactylis lima
intro: Dactylis lima, also known as Orchard Grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dactylis lima include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and providing relief from fever and pain. Dactylis lima can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
